titles.title: When I'm Weak He Is Strong

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have tried within myself To truly overcome And oft'n trying to finish The work God has begun I've had some disappointments My tears I know He sees But maybe He's just trying to tell me That I'm strongest when I'm down on my knees

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I'm weak He is strong He turns to right what I've made wrong And His grace just picks me up another time Through my inabilities His purpose is complete When I fall, I hear Him speak, "I'm strong when you are weak."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In secret you have fought and no one is aware Of the times you've fallen under a load of deep despair The thorns that never leave you, Another trial begins But these things that hold you captive, Will bring glory in the end.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, I'm never alone I cant fight this battle on my own The Lord wants to be victorious through me Though Satan tries to steal, I will conquer if I yield to the Spirit And claim the victory
